title: Preserve runtime extraction and history compatibility
description: Confirm and adjust runtime integration only where necessary so the blind-box extractor can consume pilot content through the existing category_info, parser override labels, output formatting, and draw_history item_pools semantics.
convergence: Comma-separated input still accepts blind-box numbers, animal type, and existing subcategory overrides.
category_info labels remain compatible: 大型物品, 中型物品, 散落小型物品, 悬挂物品.
History keys remain box:{box_id}:{category_key} under item_pools.
Risky item state wording is either filtered for blind-box default output or explicitly covered by tests as a known blocked condition.
